events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a back-graded section of drain piping, confirmed by a puddle test. This means the pipe is sloped the wrong way or not sloped enough, causing water to pool. IPC 704 covers drainage piping, including slope requirements (1/4 inch per foot for pipes under 3", 1/8 inch per foot for 3" and larger). A back-graded section is non-compliant. The work is rough-complete. Decision should be fail.
